sql.up: CREATE TABLE users (name text NOT NULL, email text NOT NULL, bio text NOT NULL, xata_createdat timestamptz(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp, xata_updatedat timestamptz(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp, xata_id text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'rec_'::text || xata_private.xid()::text, xata_version int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, surname text DEFAULT 'null')
